chunks.content: Document 1 chunk 0: Introduction to cloud computing and distributed systems architecture.
Document 1 chunk 1: Virtual machines provide isolated environments for running applications.
Document 1 chunk 2: Container orchestration with Kubernetes enables scalable deployments.
Document 1 chunk 3: Microservices architecture decomposes applications into small services.
Document 1 chunk 4: Load balancers distribute traffic across multiple server instances.
Document 1 chunk 5: Database replication ensures data availability and fault tolerance.
Document 1 chunk 6: Message queues enable asynchronous communication between services.
Document 1 chunk 7: Monitoring and observability tools provide system health insights.
Document 1 chunk 8: Continuous integration pipelines automate build and test processes.
Document 1 chunk 9: Infrastructure as code manages cloud resources declaratively.
